steps.title: Read the sentence frame
steps.content: The text says it is DIFFICULT to transmit biomolecules through plant cell walls (a problem), and that researchers have shown it may be possible to ______ this problem BY transmitting molecules through carbon nanotubes (a method that crosses cell walls).

steps.title: Predict the word
steps.content: The blank takes a problem as its object and is solved by a working method. The needed verb means "successfully get past" or "solve."

steps.title: Eliminate per choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'conceptualize': means to form an idea of; you don't fix a problem by conceptualizing it. ✗
  • Choice B — 'neglect': means to ignore; the researchers are addressing the problem, not ignoring it. ✗
  • Choice C — 'illustrate': means to demonstrate or depict; doesn't fit "solve a problem." ✗
  • Choice D — 'overcome': means to successfully deal with a difficulty — exactly the relationship the sentence sets up. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
